# doit_asset (Data Source)

Manage cloud resources or services in your cloud environment.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve an asset by its ID
data "doit_asset" "example" {
  id = "your-asset-id"
}

# Output asset details
output "asset_name" {
  value = data.doit_asset.example.name
}

output "asset_type" {
  value = data.doit_asset.example.type
}

output "asset_url" {
  value = data.doit_asset.example.url
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique id of an asset.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (Number) The time when the asset was created, in milliseconds since the epoch.
- `name` (String)
- `quantity` (Number)
- `type` (String)
- `url` (String)
